SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

Class ReliefFluidState

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.ReliefFluidState
final class ReliefFluidState extends Object
Package-private immutable snapshot of the relieving-fluid properties evaluated at a given relief pressure and temperature.

The snapshot is produced by flashing a clone of a NeqSim fluid at the relieving conditions and reading the specific-heat ratio, molar mass, compressibility, density and phase distribution. It is used by the TR3001 relief-load calculators so the same property-evaluation logic is shared and any flash failure degrades gracefully to documented default values.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • ReliefFluidState

      private ReliefFluidState(double specificHeatRatio, double molarMassKgPerMol, double compressibility, double densityKgPerM3, double temperatureK, ReliefPhase phase)
      Creates an immutable relieving-fluid property snapshot.
      Parameters:
      specificHeatRatio - specific-heat ratio Cp/Cv (dimensionless)
      molarMassKgPerMol - molar mass in kg/mol
      compressibility - compressibility factor Z (dimensionless)
      densityKgPerM3 - bulk density in kg/m^3
      temperatureK - relieving temperature in K
      phase - phase classification of the relieving stream

  • Method Details

    • evaluate

      static ReliefFluidState evaluate(SystemInterface fluid, double pressureBara, double temperatureK, List<String> warnings)
      Evaluates the relieving-fluid properties by flashing a clone of the supplied fluid at the given pressure and temperature. Any failure falls back to documented light-hydrocarbon defaults and records a warning.
      Parameters:
      fluid - the NeqSim fluid to evaluate; not null
      pressureBara - the relieving pressure in bara; must be positive
      temperatureK - the relieving temperature in K; must be positive
      warnings - list to which warning messages are appended; not null
      Returns:
      an immutable ReliefFluidState

    • classifyPhase

      private static ReliefPhase classifyPhase(SystemInterface state)
      Classifies the phase of a flashed fluid state into vapour, liquid or two-phase.
      Parameters:
      state - the flashed NeqSim fluid state; not null
      Returns:
      the ReliefPhase classification
